article_meta.title: Cartoon Carousel The nation’s cartoonists on the week in politics Every week political cartoonists throughout the countr

reasoning: Mixed quality: several genuine author-prose bias instances correctly flagged with mostly appropriate labels, but one item improperly includes quoted/attributed language and many clear author-level bias instances were missed.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: One flagged item (“As far as she was concerned... '100 times more damaging'”) includes quoted source language and is framed as Jean’s viewpoint, not the author’s voice.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most flagged items are defensible author-level bias; the mind-reading item is questionable/attributed, making it a notable but single false positive.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple clear author-prose biases, including the headline/frame (“McCarthyism Is Back. You Can Thank This Woman.”), sweeping present-day claims under “Trump 2.0… fear losing their jobs… right to stand on American soil,” and loaded phrases like “hard-knuckled tactics,” “wild accusation… a bridge too far,” and “unscrupulous investigations.”
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels applied are largely reasonable for the valid items; the problematic mind-reading item is mislabeled/ill-chosen due to attribution.
